memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  Count of Toulouse. Went on a crusade to the Holy Land; appointed his brother Raymond, Count of Saint-Gilles to rule in his stead.  He died within five years of leaving.

** from http://fmg.ac/Pr …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse於大約1040年出生在法國福朗-可特艾尤拉圖勞勒-a奧時，他的父親Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III44歲，母親Almodis de La Marché21歲。他於大約1066年與Mathilde Countess of Toulouse在法國奧其坦尼豪-加洛圖勞斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1094年在巴勒斯坦享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse于大约1040年出生在法国福朗-可特艾尤拉圖勞勒-a奧时，他的父亲Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III44岁，母亲Almodis de La Marché21岁。他于大约1066年与Mathilde Countess of Toulouse在法国奧其坦尼豪-加洛圖勞斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1094年在巴勒斯坦享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse was born about 1040, in Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, France, his father, Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III, was 44 and his mother, Almodis de La Marché, was 21. He married Mathilde Countess of Toulouse about 1066, in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1094, in Palestine, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse est né environ 1040, à Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, France, son père, Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Almodis de La Marché, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde Countess of Toulouse environ 1066, à Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1094, à Palestine, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse um 1040 in Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III 44 und seine Mutter Almodis de La Marché 21. Er hat um 1066 in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Frankreich Mathilde Countess of Toulouse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1094 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Palästina.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse è nato il circa 1040 nel Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Almodis de La Marché, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde Countess of Toulouse circa 1066, nel Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1094, nel Palestina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouseが約1040年にフランスフランチェ-コムトeジュラトウロウセ-レ-チaテアウで生まれた時，父Pons Guillaume de Toulouse IIIは44歳，母Almodis de La Marchéは21歳であった。約1066年にフランスオクシタニーハウテ-ガーオントウロウゼでMathilde Countess of Toulouseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1094年にパレスチナで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse(이)가 대략 1040년 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 라 토우루세-레-cha테오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Almodis de La Marché(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1066년 프랑스 옥시탠이 하테-가니 토우루스에서 Mathilde Countess of Toulouse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1094년 팔레스타인에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Almodis de La Marché, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde Countess of Toulouse aproximadamente 1066, em Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1094, em Palestina, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse родился около 1040 г. в местности тоулоусе-ле-чaто, джура, фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Almodis de La Marché, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde Countess of Toulouse около 1066 г. в местности тоулоус, хауте-гаронн, окситани, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1094 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse nació aproximadamente 1040, en Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Almodis de La Marché, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Mathilde Countess of Toulouse aproximadamente 1066, en Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1094, en Palestina, a la edad de 55 años.
